FlowDefinition.description:
Bank Account Approval
Screen flow is run by clicking a quick action button on Bank Account lightning page. Takes in current Bank Account values and allows the user to edit them, kicking off a record triggered approval process.
Stores the input values in provisional fields until approval has been granted. Records the record id of the user to submit so that they can be excluded from being able to approve.
FlowDefinition.masterLabel: Prodigy - Screen - Update Bank Account Details
